description: A circular photograph depicting a wide body of water, identified as an estuary, with a foreground bank covered in green vegetation. Across the water, a dense line of trees forms the middle ground, extending horizontally. Above the treeline in the far background, several tall, slender structures, possibly industrial towers or power lines, are visible against a blue sky with scattered white clouds. The image is presented as an example of CORINE Land Cover (CLC) class 8.3.2 Estuaries, characterised by river influence.
